title: DOM basics
description: Find, read, and change elements from JS.

options: The first element matching the selector, or null
questions.explanation: querySelector = first match. querySelectorAll returns a NodeList of all.

questions.prompt: Which returns a NodeList of ALL matches?
questions.explanation: querySelectorAll — iterate with forEach or spread to array.

questions.prompt: What logs when no matching element exists?
questions.explanation: querySelector returns null on no match — always guard before use.

questions.prompt: Which reads the visible text of an element?
questions.explanation: textContent is text only. innerHTML includes markup. value is for form inputs.

questions.prompt: Which SAFELY sets user-provided text (avoids XSS)?
questions.explanation: textContent is inert — sets text without parsing HTML.

questions.prompt: Which toggles a class on an element?

questions.explanation: createElement + appendChild is the standard pattern.

questions.prompt: el.dataset.userId corresponds to which HTML attribute?
questions.explanation: dataset auto-camelCases data-* attributes. data-user-id → dataset.userId.
